# AskDB

> AskDB is a self-hosted, open-source MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that gives AI agents — Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Gemini, Claude Code — safe, read-only access to MongoDB and PostgreSQL databases. It solves the "connect an AI to production data" problem by sandboxing a copy of the database, enforcing field-level visibility, auto-detecting PII, and exposing a single `/mcp` endpoint behind OAuth 2.1 or a static API key.

License: MIT
Source: https://github.com/mgorabbani/askdb
Homepage: https://askdb.dev
Install (VPS): `curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mgorabbani/askdb/main/install.sh | sudo bash`

## What AskDB is

- An MCP server spoken by any MCP-compatible AI client (Claude desktop, Claude Code, ChatGPT, Cursor, Gemini).
- A sandbox layer: reads your production DB once via `mongodump` / `pg_dump`, then all agent queries run against a local copy. Production is never written to.
- A visibility gate: per-connection, per-collection, per-field toggles. Hidden fields never appear in results, schema output, or samples.
- A PII detector: flags fields like `email`, `phone`, `ssn`, `address` for one-click hiding.
- A multi-DB workspace: agents see a `databases://overview` resource and pass a `connectionId` into each query tool.

## Key capabilities

- **Sandbox isolation** — production DB is read-only; agents query the sandbox copy.
- **Field-level control** — toggle fields on/off; hidden fields are removed server-side, not masked.
- **PII auto-detection** — heuristics flag likely-sensitive fields for review.
- **Two engines, one surface** — MongoDB and PostgreSQL, same tool shape.
- **Code Mode** — `execute-typescript` lets an agent batch many queries into one round trip.
- **MCP Apps Result Viewer** — returns interactive result UIs inside Claude.
- **OAuth 2.1 + static API keys** — OAuth for remote AI tools, keys for local clients.

## Supported MCP tools

`list-databases`, `list-collections`, `collection-schema`, `find`, `aggregate`, `count`, `distinct`, `query`, `sample-documents`, `execute-typescript`, `save-insight`.

## Install modes

- **VPS + Caddy + HTTPS** — `curl ... install.sh | sudo bash`. 2–3 minutes end-to-end, auto Let's Encrypt.
- **Local Docker Compose** — evaluation on a laptop.
- **Cloudflare Tunnel** — no inbound firewall, no DNS A record.
- **Proxyless** — binds `127.0.0.1:3100` for Coolify / Traefik / nginx.

## Databases supported

- MongoDB (first-class)
- PostgreSQL (first-class)
- MySQL (roadmap)

## Who it's for

Teams that want AI agents on real production data without shipping rows to a third-party SaaS or writing a custom scrubbing pipeline. Self-hosted on the user's VPS; the VPS is the security boundary.

## Not affiliated with

DBGate, MongoDB Inc., Anthropic, OpenAI, or Google. MCP is an open protocol from Anthropic.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/mgorabbani/askdb/blob/main/README.md): project overview, quick start, and screenshots.
- [FAQ](https://github.com/mgorabbani/askdb/blob/main/docs/faq.md): common questions about security, hosting, and supported clients.
- [Code Mode](https://github.com/mgorabbani/askdb/blob/main/docs/code-mode.md): how the `execute-typescript` tool batches multi-step queries into one agent round trip.
- [Changelog](https://github.com/mgorabbani/askdb/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): release notes.
- [Contributing](https://github.com/mgorabbani/askdb/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): how to build from source and open a PR.
- [Security policy](https://github.com/mgorabbani/askdb/blob/main/SECURITY.md): how to report vulnerabilities.

## Optional

- [Landing page brief](https://github.com/mgorabbani/askdb/blob/main/docs/LANDING_PAGE_BRIEF.md): positioning and messaging reference for askdb.dev.

- [Unify MCP server plan](https://github.com/mgorabbani/askdb/blob/main/docs/plans/unify-mcp-server.md): architecture plan for a single MCP surface across engines.
